message:
✨ Integrate demo mode switching with UnifiedCard and UnifiedStatBlock (#745)

* ✨ Integrate demo mode switching with UnifiedCard skeleton

- Add mode switching detection to UnifiedCard
- Show skeleton during demo/live mode transitions
- Integrate with useReportCardDataState for refresh icon animation
- Skeleton displays when loading OR when mode is switching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Integrate demo mode switching with UnifiedStatBlock skeleton

- Add mode switching detection to UnifiedStatBlock
- Show skeleton with refresh animation during mode transitions
- Use consistent bg-secondary/60 colors for skeleton elements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
